nasb.text: When He utters His voice, there is a tumult of waters in the heavens, And He causes the clouds to ascend from the end of the earth; He makes lightning for the rain, And brings out the wind from His storehouses.

esv.text: When he utters his voice, there is a tumult of waters in the heavens, and he makes the mist rise from the ends of the earth. He makes lightning for the rain, and he brings forth the wind from his storehouses.

cnv.text: 他一發聲，空中眾水就澎湃； 他使雲霧從地極上騰； 他造了閃電和雷雨， 又使風從他的倉庫裡吹出來。

ccb.text: 祂一声令下，天上大水涌动； 祂使云从地极升起， 使闪电在雨中发出， 祂从自己的仓库吹出风来。
